description: The Metaverse is envisioned as a fully immersive virtual reality where users can experience information in real-time and three dimensions. It aims to engage all five senses, creating an alternative reality. Coined by Neal Stephenson in 1992, the term has gained traction as virtual reality and immersive experiences have become more popular.
topic_summary: The Metaverse concept, introduced by Neal Stephenson in [t=17:20], describes a future immersive virtual reality that engages all senses. Its popularity has surged with advancements in virtual reality technology and gaming, providing users with experiences akin to the Metaverse [t=38:77].
